default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and ongoing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Social post instructions implemented; new batch of 25 articles delivered with social posts included](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Organic traffic metrics show positive trends: impressions, sessions, and users all increasing](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Automation efforts ongoing for publishing content and integrating with Tray](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Discussion on adapting content strategy for LLMs and potential Reddit-inspired tactics](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)

## Topics

### Social Media Content Implementation

  - [New batch of 25 articles delivered with social posts for Facebook and Instagram](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Request to retroactively add delivery dates to older content for better tracking](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Action item: Add estimated delivery dates to "Ready to Publish" articles](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Performance Metrics Review

  - [Organic traffic metrics showing positive trends from January to August:](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [Sessions increased from \~1,000 to \~1,800](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [New users up from 949 to \~1,500](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [Engagement time improved to 1 minute 27 seconds](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Click-through rate remained steady at 0.3% despite increased impressions](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Action item: Provide list of key events to prioritize in future reports (e.g., B2B form fills, B2C shop directory clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

### Content Strategy and LLM Considerations

  - [Discussion on adapting content for LLM consumption](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Potential experiments with Reddit-inspired content tactics](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Consideration of creating Sunbit-specific subreddits or contributing to existing ones](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [GrowthX to share insights from ongoing experiment with Monograph team](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

### Automation and Integration Updates

  - [Publishing automation ticket with engineering team; awaiting implementation](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Sunbit AI integration: Marcel informed and will set up ticket](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Tray webhook integration pending; Jason requested notification when testing begins](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)

### Tray Platform Discussion

  - [Sunbit evaluating iPaaS options, likely to continue with Tray despite pricing concerns](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Jason highlighted Tray's value in empowering business users to build their own agents](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Shared success story: Tray integration saved $60,000 on Salesforce to NetSuite project](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ehtisham to update on publishing automation progress](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Jason to provide list of key events for prioritized reporting](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Kyle to mention Sunbit's Tray usage and pricing concerns to Tray team at upcoming event](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [GrowthX to share insights from Reddit-inspired content experiment when available](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Jason to monitor Tray webhook logs when testing begins (48-hour window)](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Continue evaluating and implementing content strategies with LLM considerations](https://fathom.video/share/VSCRqtM5KVjxUjHbpLmgiai3PgAdPLNM?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)

action_items.description: Retroactively add delivery dates to older articles in Ready to Publish group
Provide list of priority key events for B2B (form fills) and B2C (shop directory, pre-qual links)
Notify Jason when engineering starts webhook testing for Tray integration
Mention Sunbit's Tray pricing concerns to Niels at happy hour
